evidence_label: case-001 clinician confirmation packet index gate, not medical advice

source_checks.source_role: Transfusion category, burden, response, and adverse-event context.
Ferritin trend, LIC, cardiac T2*, chelation, and organ-risk context.
Routine monitoring domains before disease-modifying therapy questions.
May 22 API check: pediatric TDT mitapivat remains not yet recruiting with no posted results.
May 22 API check: pediatric NTDT mitapivat remains not yet recruiting with no posted results.
May 22 API check: adult TDT mitapivat has posted results; benchmark context only.

packet_order.deliverable: case-001 doctor handoff brief or compiled doctor handoff PDF
packet_order.doctor_intent: Confirm what should be validated and which records are missing.

packet_order.deliverable: private lab and screening PDFs plus current private records
packet_order.doctor_intent: Let the clinician review source records outside the public repo.
Mark each public-safe label as correct, wrong, or not confirmable.

packet_order.deliverable: record request matrix and owner category labels
packet_order.doctor_intent: Name the first missing records and the right hospital, lab, blood-bank, or specialist owner.
State whether specialist screening is ready, data-missing, medically unsuitable, access-blocked, or under review.
Ask whether mitapivat is worth clinical review only after scope, labels, records, and seven domains pass.
Use the long paper only if the clinician asks for the broader evidence map.

decision_rule: The doctor-facing packet starts with a one-page confirmation request. The main paper is appendix-only. The mitapivat lane is downstream of label validation, missing-record closure, and seven-domain readiness.
